texts.label: text
texts.orig: All the protection you need to enjoy a more active lifestyle
texts.text: All the protection you need to enjoy a more active lifestyle

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Empowering you to lead the active life you love with high protection against the unexpected
texts.text: Empowering you to lead the active life you love with high protection against the unexpected

texts.label: text
texts.orig: While the YOLO lifestyle is all about embracing spontaneity to experience all things exciting, it could also bring about a few misadventures. As such, it's wise to give yourself a financial safety net with high personal accident protection.
texts.text: While the YOLO lifestyle is all about embracing spontaneity to experience all things exciting, it could also bring about a few misadventures. As such, it's wise to give yourself a financial safety net with high personal accident protection.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: GREAT Protector Active offers up to S$3 million in personal accident coverage and provides the assurance you need on your adventures including increased-risk activities 1  like scuba diving and rock-climbing, and even during your daily commute. Furthermore, your coverage gets boosted up to 1.5 times when you are injured from most traffic-related accidents 2  in Singapore and for any accidents while overseas.
texts.text: GREAT Protector Active offers up to S$3 million in personal accident coverage and provides the assurance you need on your adventures including increased-risk activities 1  like scuba diving and rock-climbing, and even during your daily commute. Furthermore, your coverage gets boosted up to 1.5 times when you are injured from most traffic-related accidents 2  in Singapore and for any accidents while overseas.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Sign up online with affordable premium from S$0.89* a day and enjoy the active life you deserve.
texts.text: Sign up online with affordable premium from S$0.89* a day and enjoy the active life you deserve.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Get up to S$3 million in coverage against accidents
texts.text: Get up to S$3 million in coverage against accidents

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Benefit from one of the highest personal accident plan that provides up to S$3 million in coverage against Accidental Major Permanent Disablement. 3 With the high lump sum payout, your medical and caregiving expenses can be supported while you adjust to your lifestyle changes.
texts.text: Benefit from one of the highest personal accident plan that provides up to S$3 million in coverage against Accidental Major Permanent Disablement. 3 With the high lump sum payout, your medical and caregiving expenses can be supported while you adjust to your lifestyle changes.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Boost coverage by up to 1.5 times with Benefit Booster 4
texts.text: Boost coverage by up to 1.5 times with Benefit Booster 4

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Get up to 1.5 times extra protection when you are injured in an accident as a pedestrian or cyclist on the road, or a passenger in a private car or public transport, or in any accident when overseas.
texts.text: Get up to 1.5 times extra protection when you are injured in an accident as a pedestrian or cyclist on the road, or a passenger in a private car or public transport, or in any accident when overseas.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Your recovery will also not be compromised with high medical expenses reimbursement of up to S$7,500 per accident for outpatient and hospitalisation expenses. You also have the choice of your preferred medical treatment and care by a Complementary Medicine Practitioner or Allied Health Professional after an accident.
texts.text: Your recovery will also not be compromised with high medical expenses reimbursement of up to S$7,500 per accident for outpatient and hospitalisation expenses. You also have the choice of your preferred medical treatment and care by a Complementary Medicine Practitioner or Allied Health Professional after an accident.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Start a conversation with your Great Eastern Financial Representative today and find out more.
texts.text: Start a conversation with your Great Eastern Financial Representative today and find out more.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1 Such activities are covered only if they are engaged on a leisure basis with or managed under a licensed organisation or establishment. Please refer to the product summary for details.
texts.text: 1 Such activities are covered only if they are engaged on a leisure basis with or managed under a licensed organisation or establishment. Please refer to the product summary for details.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2  Applicable where Life Assured was a pedestrian, cyclist or passenger, or on a Public Conveyance as a passenger.
texts.text: 2  Applicable where Life Assured was a pedestrian, cyclist or passenger, or on a Public Conveyance as a passenger.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: *  Daily rate is based on the annual premium of GREAT Protector Active Basic, divided by 365 days and rounded off to the nearest cent. Premium rate is inclusive of the prevailing rate of GST. The prevailing rate of GST is subject to change. The premium rates for this policy are not guaranteed and may be adjusted based on future experience.
texts.text: Daily rate is based on the annual premium of GREAT Protector Active Basic, divided by 365 days and rounded off to the nearest cent. Premium rate is inclusive of the prevailing rate of GST. The prevailing rate of GST is subject to change. The premium rates for this policy are not guaranteed and may be adjusted based on future experience.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4  Benefit Booster provides up to 150% of payout under all sections listed in the table of benefits except the sub-limits under Accidental Medical Expense Reimbursement. Benefit Booster is only applicable when the Life Assured suffers injuries from: (i) accidents while on public conveyance as a passenger, (ii) being involved in a road traffic accident as a pedestrian, cyclist or passenger; or (iii) accidents while outside of Singapore.
texts.text: 4  Benefit Booster provides up to 150% of payout under all sections listed in the table of benefits except the sub-limits under Accidental Medical Expense Reimbursement. Benefit Booster is only applicable when the Life Assured suffers injuries from: (i) accidents while on public conveyance as a passenger, (ii) being involved in a road traffic accident as a pedestrian, cyclist or passenger; or (iii) accidents while outside of Singapore.

texts.label: footnote
texts.orig: ^  Daily rates are based on the annual premium of GREAT Protector Active Basic, Classic or Elite, whichever applicable, divided by 365 days and rounded off to the nearest cent.
texts.text: ^  Daily rates are based on the annual premium of GREAT Protector Active Basic, Classic or Elite, whichever applicable, divided by 365 days and rounded off to the nearest cent.

texts.label: footnote
texts.orig: #  Premium rates include the prevailing rate of GST. The prevailing rate of GST is subject to change. The premium rates for this policy are not guaranteed and may be adjusted based on future experience.
texts.text: #  Premium rates include the prevailing rate of GST. The prevailing rate of GST is subject to change. The premium rates for this policy are not guaranteed and may be adjusted based on future experience.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Here's how GREAT Protector Active supports your active lifestyle
texts.text: Here's how GREAT Protector Active supports your active lifestyle

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Danielle loses the sight in her right eye due to a tennis injury and receives a payout of  S$1,500,000.
texts.text: Danielle loses the sight in her right eye due to a tennis injury and receives a payout of  S$1,500,000.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Danielle breaks her tooth while having a meal on a trip in Malaysia. She claims for a medical expense reimbursement of up to S$7,500.
texts.text: Danielle breaks her tooth while having a meal on a trip in Malaysia. She claims for a medical expense reimbursement of up to S$7,500.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Danielle, a graduate school student who loves outdoor activities and travelling, signs up for GREAT Protector Active (Elite) with a Sum Assured of S$1,000,000 to safeguard against the unexpected. Her annual premium is S$865.89 # .
texts.text: Danielle, a graduate school student who loves outdoor activities and travelling, signs up for GREAT Protector Active (Elite) with a Sum Assured of S$1,000,000 to safeguard against the unexpected. Her annual premium is S$865.89 # .

texts.orig: 5  Refers to any confirmed diagnosis of (i) Injury and/ or condition due to a bite, sting, attack or such similar incident by an insect or animal, (ii) food poisoning, or (iii) Hand, Foot and Mouth Disease.
texts.text: 5  Refers to any confirmed diagnosis of (i) Injury and/ or condition due to a bite, sting, attack or such similar incident by an insect or animal, (ii) food poisoning, or (iii) Hand, Foot and Mouth Disease.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All ages specified refer to age next birthday.
texts.text: All ages specified refer to age next birthday.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: This advertisement has not been reviewed by the Monetary Authority of Singapore.
texts.text: This advertisement has not been reviewed by the Monetary Authority of Singapore.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Singapore Citizens, Permanent Residents (PRs) and holders of Employment Pass who are aged between 17 and 65, may purchase any plan (Basic, Classic, Elite) under this policy. Juveniles (aged between 1 to 16) and holders of S Pass, Dependant's Pass or Student's Pass may purchase only the Basic Plan under this policy.
texts.text: Singapore Citizens, Permanent Residents (PRs) and holders of Employment Pass who are aged between 17 and 65, may purchase any plan (Basic, Classic, Elite) under this policy. Juveniles (aged between 1 to 16) and holders of S Pass, Dependant's Pass or Student's Pass may purchase only the Basic Plan under this policy.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The above is for general information only. It is not a contract of insurance. The precise terms and conditions of this insurance plan are specified in the policy contract.
texts.text: The above is for general information only. It is not a contract of insurance. The precise terms and conditions of this insurance plan are specified in the policy contract.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: It is usually detrimental to replace an existing accident and health plan with a new one. A penalty may be imposed for early plan termination and the new plan may cost more, or have less benefits at the same cost.
texts.text: It is usually detrimental to replace an existing accident and health plan with a new one. A penalty may be imposed for early plan termination and the new plan may cost more, or have less benefits at the same cost.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Protected up to specified limits by SDIC.
texts.text: Protected up to specified limits by SDIC.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: You may wish to seek advice from a qualified adviser before buying the product. If you choose not to seek advice from a qualified adviser, you should consider whether the product is suitable for you. If you decide that the policy is not suitable after purchasing the policy, you may terminate the policy in accordance with the free-look provision, if any, and the insurer may recover from you any expense incurred by the insurer in underwriting the policy.
texts.text: You may wish to seek advice from a qualified adviser before buying the product. If you choose not to seek advice from a qualified adviser, you should consider whether the product is suitable for you. If you decide that the policy is not suitable after purchasing the policy, you may terminate the policy in accordance with the free-look provision, if any, and the insurer may recover from you any expense incurred by the insurer in underwriting the policy.
